description_long: This is a single-story cabin with a broad, reddish-brown gable roof featuring a prominent triangular dormer and a brick chimney. The exterior walls are finished in a textured, earth-toned material, likely stucco or brick, and the foundation is bordered by a concrete or stone base. The front facade has a single door with a small awning and three rectangular windows, while the longer side displays five evenly spaced windows. The roof overhangs the walls, providing some shelter around the perimeter, and the dormer adds architectural interest. A small trash bin and a car are placed nearby, suggesting a residential context. The overall design is simple and functional, with a rustic yet urban-friendly appearance.
description: A single-story, earth-toned cabin with a wide gable roof, triangular dormer, and multiple rectangular windows. The structure features a front door, chimney, and a concrete base, giving it a rustic yet urban look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance door, three rectangular windows, a trash bin, and a car parked to the right. The gable roof and triangular dormer are prominent.
description_view_1: This side view highlights five evenly spaced windows and the triangular dormer on the roof, with the chimney visible near the left edge. The car is parked on the left.
description_view_2: The rear view displays three windows and the open gable end, with the car visible in the background. The chimney and dormer are also visible from this angle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows five windows and the uninterrupted expanse of the gable roof, with the chimney and dormer visible. No doors are present on this side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a triangular dormer and brick chimney, constructed from reddish-brown roofing material with moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows: three on the front facade, five on each long side, and three on the rear, all evenly spaced and of similar size
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door located on the front facade, offset to the left side beneath a small awning
